TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cipurungan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 149 buwan, 430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 37% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 63% kyan ku 273 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 32%, Bunun 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipurungan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cipurungan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cipurungan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cipurungan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cipurungan hya' ga Ciwcia. tay mkyahu' na Cipurungan hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cipurungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cipurungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cipurungan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 149 buwan, 430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 37% kyan ku 157 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 63% kyan ku 273 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 32%, Bunun 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipurungan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cipurungan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cipurungan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cipurungan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cipurungan hya' ga Ciwcia. tay mkyahu' na Cipurungan hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cipurungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cipurungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa kano ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħis~ɕħaŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨipuruŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
